transcript: My name’s Pingpong. I’m new to the area; I just moved down here from Castle Rock and, ah, I got your number from the mailman, ah—

So yeah, just gonna be taking some pictures and some video and stuff. Is there any chance you’d let me borrow your, uh, fire truck? We’re just making a video and we’ve got worms and snakes. It’s gonna be wild! Real wild!
Jona Olsson, Chief of the Fire Department?
Yes, uh-huh! I live in the some area as you. We got the same mailman up here. [emergency siren]
Okay. Where—Where are you living, Pingpong?
I just moved down from Colorado! So [laughs]—
—I mean, I don’t know anybody else in the area up here! [laughs]
I live in New Mexico now. I’m brand new and we’re making a video—I’ll credit ya, however you want, on YouTube!
—Where are you living in New Mexico?
Well, I don’t know the area too well, but we have the same mailman; he gave me your number. I can give you three, four dollars, you know, a day!
[train clatter] Hey! Hey Jona, it’s Pingpong. Can we please work sumpin’ out here for just a few hours of your time?
I can’t—A: what are the sirens I keep hearing?
[train] Well, I’m outside! I was going to your house to knock on the door but no one answered.
There’s no sirens going by up here!
Oh! [delay] So, can we please work this out on [edit?] your fire truck up ‘ere! I can give ya five, six dollars, you know, an hour!—
—There’s no Department vehicle that I can loan to anyone, so please stop calling me. Thank you!
Can I borrow your car for the video shoot. Just for—
Hi, Jona! I did wanna let you know that I’m gonna be there in a few minutes just to get into the fire truck, okay? For the photographs? [inhales] It’ll just—
—You—Would you stop calling? I don’t know what kinda scam you’re doing—
Jona, hi! I only need 20 minutes of your time, okay, today?
You’re not getting any of my time. I have no idea who you are and what kinda scam you are running—
—I told you I’d credit you, however you want, on YouTube, for the video!
I don’t give a shit about that!—
—I’ll meet you in ten minutes. It’ll be great, okay?—
Lemme get a photograph with you, okay?
—What appears to be the trouble up here?!
Hi! I just wanted to let ya know we were there over the weekend. We were with the trucks and, ah, we’re all done and we’re all taken care of, okay?—
Jona, just real quick: the only thing is we left behind an earthworm. Have you guys seen that, at all? Our cameraman—
—Would you shut the fuck up? Who are you?!
—Pingpong! I don’t believe that for a second. I don’t know what kinda scam you’re running… [inhales] Can you understand me?—
—You seem to understand English. Do not call me again, ever!
Will you just find the earthworm, please? And we’ll be done!—
